News
Image
Proud to cut the ribbon and officially open Harvey Norman
24 April 2026

Today local MP Sir Andrew Mitchell and former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street officially opened the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre.
Image
Backing Sutton United to win promotion
24 April 2026

Yesterday Sir Andrew Mitchell visited Sutton United Football Club in Coleshill Road alongside Reddicap councillor Richard Parkin, ahead of the club’s much anticipated play-off semi-final this weekend at home against Heather St Johns FC.
Weekly Message to Constituents 315 - A new era for our town centre
24 April 2026

Today it was my great pleasure to join our former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street to officially open the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre.
Weekly Message to Constituents 314 - Frustration as development gets go-ahead despite campaign
17 April 2026

Unwanted Wishaw battery plan gets the green light despite community opposition.
Image
Tackling offroad bike menace
17 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell recently welcomed local resident Lee Bashford to his advice surgery who has raised concerns about off-road motorbikes on The Greenway and surrounding area. 
Image
Opening new estate agents in our town
17 April 2026

Local MP Sir Andrew Mitchell had the pleasure of performing the official opening of Wilkins Estate Agents in Mere Green - one of the most recent investments into the Mere Green local economy.
Image
A welcome boost for local healthcare: opening Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill
10 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell officially opened the brand new Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill Surgery – a welcome addition to Sutton Coldfield’s healthcare services.
Weekly Message to Constituents 313 - A welcome boost for local healthcare
10 April 2026

This week I had a wonderful time officially opening the brand new Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill Surgery – a welcome addition to Sutton Coldfield’s healthcare services.
Image
Sutton metals firm restores historic war memorial
10 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell visited Beaver Metals to see the magnificent war memorial from the former Birmingham Mint, which the company have beautifully restored for posterity.

Rt Hon Sir Andrew Mitchell MP
House of Commons
London SW1A 0AA

Westminster Office: 020 7219 8516

Constituency Office: 0121 354 2229

Email: andrew.mitchell.mp@parliament.uk

 

Sutton Coldfield Constituency: Sutton Four Oaks, Sutton Mere Green, Sutton Reddicap, Sutton Roughley, Sutton Trinity, Sutton Vesey, Sutton Walmley & Minworth, Sutton Wylde Green.
